mapper.insert: INSERT INTO documents (title, full_content, source_type, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{fullContent}, #{sourceType}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, full_content, source_type, status, model, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM documents ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE documents SET status = 'pending', error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'failed'
UPDATE documents SET status = 'pending', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'processing'
